title: FaithfulFFA
description: Powerful and very customizeable Build FFA & Kit PVP Plugin.
body:
# FaithfulFFA  
A Powerful and very customizeable Build FFA & Kit PVP Plugin.
# 
![EasyToUse](http://cdn.nanderez.net/hmqWn9KA12RFuPOUDGbo/6811403b1ecaf4.39899273.png)
FaithfulFFA is designed with simplicity in mind: Just install, configure very minimal settings to your liking and you're ready to play. With minimal dependencies, it's easy for any server owner to get started.
#
![Requirements](http://cdn.nanderez.net/hmqWn9KA12RFuPOUDGbo/68124ce69af129.64407653.png)
In Order to run FaithfulFFA you will need to fill the following requirements:

- Java Version: `Java 8` 
- Spigot/Bukkit/Paper `Minecraft 1.8.8 Server`
- Have an accessable `MySQL Database`
- Placeholder API Plugin installed
# 
![Setup](http://cdn.nanderez.net/hmqWn9KA12RFuPOUDGbo/681140ec660a08.04568139.png)

## Base Setup
1. At first you need to drop the .jar File that you download on this Page into your `/Plugins/` Folder.
2. Next you are gonna download Placeholder API and place the .jar File into your `/Plugins/` Folder.
3. After that start your Server and locate the `/Plugins/FaithfulFFA/` Directory.
4. Open the `/Plugins/FaithfulFFA/config.yml` File with any Texteditor and fill out the Storage Information.
5. After you have filled out your Database Credentials you can restart your Server with `/stop`.
6. Now we will need to setup a Map for your FFA Arena.
7. Navigate into the World that you want to use (You can use [Multiverse-Core](https://modrinth.com/plugin/multiverse-core) for this)
8. Run `/faithfulffa setup` in the Chat.
9. Read the Instructions and then run `/faithfulffa setup ExampleMap` (ExampleMap being your Map's name)
10. Use the Cyan Wool to set the Spawn Location at the Point where you are Standing.
11. After that use the Gray Wool to set Void height. Every player will die if they fall below this Height.
12. Now set the Build Height with the Yellow Wool. Players will be able to fight and receive their Kits below this Level.
13. When you have Completed Step 3-5 you are ready to interact with the Barrier block. This will finish the setup of the Map.
14. Now use `/stop` to restart your Server.
15. After rejoining you will be teleported to the Map Spawn which you set earlier. When you jump down to your Build Height you will receive the default kit.

## Editing Configurations
1. In order to customize the Plugin you can navigate to the `/Plugins/FaithfulFFA/` Directory.
2. You will find a few Files which end with .yml here. You can open any of these and edit the Strings (Text) to your liking. WARNING: Do not edit the maps.yml file except for the `displayname` of each map.

# 
![Commands](http://cdn.nanderez.net/hmqWn9KA12RFuPOUDGbo/68117a8ef122b6.23418441.png)
## Commands
| Command | Arguments | Permission |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
| `/ffa reload` |  | `faithful.reload` |
| `/ffa setup` | `<name>` | `faithful.setup` |
| `/build` |  | `faithful.buildmode` |
| `/stats` |  |  |

#
![Placeholders](http://cdn.nanderez.net/hmqWn9KA12RFuPOUDGbo/681253d528c9d6.92325586.png)
## Placeholders


| Placeholder | Description | Example |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
| %faithful_online%     | Online Player Count     | 50 |
| %faithful_max_online%     | Max Online Players     | 100 |
| %faithful_kills%     | Total Kills     | 10 |
| %faithful_deaths%     | Total Deaths     | 2 |
| %faithful_killstreak%     | Current Killstreak     | 5 |
| %faithful_kit%     | Current Equipped Kit     | Default |
| %faithful_kd%     | Total Kills & Deaths Ratio     | 5 |
| %faithful_map%     | Current Map Name     | Dust |
| %faithful_time_remaining%     | Time left on the Current Map     | 10:47 |
